<!--
Thanks for contributing to Rivetr! Please fill out the sections below.
See CONTRIBUTING.md for the full process.
-->

## Summary

<!-- What does this PR change and why? -->

## Type of change

- [ ] `feat` — new feature
- [ ] `fix` — bug fix
- [ ] `refactor` — code reorganization (no behavior change)
- [ ] `docs` — documentation only
- [ ] `test` — adding or fixing tests
- [ ] `chore` — build, tooling, dependencies

## Related issues

<!-- e.g. Closes #123 -->

## Checklist

- [ ] `cargo fmt --check` passes
- [ ] `cargo clippy` passes with no new warnings
- [ ] `cargo test` passes
- [ ] For frontend changes: `npm run lint` and `npm run build` pass
- [ ] No secrets, credentials, or personal data committed
- [ ] New public Rust functions have doc comments
- [ ] If user-facing, `README.md` and/or `CHANGELOG.md` updated
- [ ] Database changes include a numbered migration in `migrations/`
- [ ] New container operations implemented for both `DockerRuntime` and `PodmanRuntime`

## Screenshots / notes

<!-- Optional: UI screenshots, performance notes, breaking changes. -->
